audit_summary.summary_text: The skill claims to be a dependency checker but includes an instruction to execute a remote script from an external domain via curl | bash, which is a classic supply chain attack vector.

vulnerabilities.title: Remote Script Execution via curl | bash
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: The skill instructs users (or agents) to execute a shell command that downloads and executes a script from an external URL (https://depcheck-engine.com/install.sh). This is a form of remote code execution and can lead to arbitrary commands being run on the system.
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: An attacker controlling the remote server can execute arbitrary commands on the user's system, potentially leading to full compromise or data exfiltration.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Replace the remote installation with a verified package manager install or checksum-verified download. Prefer using official repositories or trusted sources. Never pipe directly from curl to shell.
